# Carmen Foia — Psiholog Oradea

> Carmen Foia is a clinical psychologist (psiholog clinician) based in Oradea, Romania. She offers individual and couples therapy, psychological counselling, sports psychology, performance-anxiety support, vocational guidance and personal development. Sessions are available in person at the Oradea office or online, in both Romanian and English.

## About

- **Practitioner:** Carmen Foia, Clinical Psychologist (Psiholog Clinician)
- **Practice:** Cabinet Individual Psihologie Carmen Foia (CUI/VAT 54513889)
- **Location:** Str. Vasile Alecsandri nr. 7, Oradea, Bihor, Romania
- **Contact:** +40 770 926 562 (phone / WhatsApp) · contact@psihologcarmenfoia.ro
- **Languages:** Romanian and English (Carmen is a British citizen and provides therapy in English)
- **Session format:** In person (Oradea office) or online (Google Meet)
- **Price:** 150 RON per session
- **Booking:** Online scheduling with card payment via the Contact page

## Services

- Individual therapy (terapie individuală)
- Couples therapy (terapie de cuplu)
- Psychological counselling (consiliere psihologică)
- Sports psychology (psihologie sportivă)
- Performance anxiety (anxietate de performanță)
- Vocational / career guidance (orientare vocațională)
- Personal development (dezvoltare personală)
- Support for students and athletes

## Key pages

- [Home](https://psihologcarmenfoia.ro/): Overview of services and approach
- [Book a session](https://psihologcarmenfoia.ro/contact): Choose session type (in person or online) and an available time
- [Blog](https://psihologcarmenfoia.ro/blog): Articles on therapy, anxiety, emotional wellbeing and personal development
- [News](https://psihologcarmenfoia.ro/noutati): Events, conferences, workshops and projects
- [FAQ](https://psihologcarmenfoia.ro/intrebari-frecvente): Frequently asked questions about the therapeutic process

## Notes

- The site is bilingual: Romanian for visitors in Romania, English elsewhere.
- For appointments, prefer the Contact page or WhatsApp at +40 770 926 562.
